- 🚨 **WEBSITE IS DEAD** — Page title returns `"Not paid | Runshop"`. The site is on an expired Shopify-like plan and is completely inaccessible to visitors. Customers searching for them find a blank error page.
- 🚨 **Zero meta description** — Google can't index the business. Invisible in search.
- 🚨 **No WhatsApp button** — Critical in UAE. Customers expect instant WhatsApp contact.
- 🚨 **No contact form** — No fallback for leads.
- Business is clearly active (phone number indexed by Google, Google cache of site exists) but hemorrhaging customers from a dead site.

## PROSPECT 2 — Kamie Photography & Films

| **Vertical** | Commercial Photography Studio — Dubai |
| **Demo URL** | https://lumina-lens-six.vercel.app |
| **Proposal URL** | https://webvanguardai.github.io/proposal-lumina-lens/ |

### ✅ Verified Pain Points (Playwright confirmed)
- ❌ **No WhatsApp button anywhere on the site** — For a commercial photographer in Dubai, this is a massive conversion killer. Every competitor offers instant WhatsApp contact.
- ❌ **No contact form** — The contact page just shows a phone/email address with no form. Visitors can't submit an inquiry without switching apps.
- ❌ **No online booking or quote system** — No way to book a session or request a quote online. All friction, no conversion.
- ⚠️ **Very thin meta description** — 14 years of experience mentioned nowhere prominent; SEO is weak.
- ⚠️ **No visible social proof on homepage** — Portfolio exists but no testimonials, client logos, or credibility signals above the fold.

### 📧 Email Draft

**Subject:** Quick observation about your Kamie Photography website

Hi,

I was browsing commercial photography studios in Dubai and landed on kamiephotography.com — great portfolio, 14 years of experience clearly shows. But I noticed a few things that might be costing you leads:

1. **No WhatsApp button** — In Dubai, clients expect to WhatsApp before they email. Without it, you're losing the impulse inquiry.
2. **No contact form** — Your contact page lists a phone and email, but there's no form to fill out, which means higher drop-off for visitors who just want to leave a quick note.
3. **No booking or quote request flow** — A client ready to book has no obvious next step.

We built a demo site specifically for photography studios in Dubai that shows what a high-converting version could look like:

## PROSPECT 3 — MyGlow Dubai (Reformer Pilates Studio)
**Status:** ✅ READY TO SEND

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Business Name** | MyGlow Dubai |
| **Website** | https://myglowdubai.com |
| **Email** | hello@myglowdubai.com |
| **Instagram** | @myglowpilatesdubai |
| **Vertical** | Reformer Pilates Studio — Dubai |
| **Demo URL** | https://aura-fitness-henna.vercel.app |
| **Proposal URL** | https://webvanguardai.github.io/proposal-aura-fitness/ |

### ✅ Verified Pain Points (Playwright confirmed)
- ❌ **No WhatsApp button** — In UAE, fitness studios live and die by WhatsApp. No button = friction. Checked both desktop and mobile: not present anywhere.
- ❌ **No Google Maps embed** — New clients can't verify location at a glance. Having to open a separate Maps search is a real drop-off point for first-time visitors.
- ⚠️ **Meta description is generic/operational** — "premier reformer pilates studio in Dubai featuring top-of-the-line reformer equipment providing versatile and dynamic environment" — no emotional hook, no differentiation, no CTA.
- ⚠️ **No visible pricing on site** — Booking button exists but no class packages or pricing visible, which creates friction.

### 📧 Email Draft

**Subject:** Two quick things I noticed on myglowdubai.com

Hi MyGlow team,

Love what you're building at MyGlow — reformer pilates is booming in Dubai and you clearly have the brand aesthetic right.

I ran a quick audit on your site and found two things worth flagging:

1. **No WhatsApp button** — In the UAE, this is the #1 way potential clients try to reach a studio before booking. Your competitors have it; not having it likely means losing warm leads daily.
2. **No Google Maps embed** — First-time visitors can't locate you with a tap. For a studio that needs walk-ins and new signups, this is friction you don't want.

## PROSPECT 4 — Wellness By Miia (Sports Nutritionist)
**Status:** ✅ READY TO SEND

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Business Name** | Wellness By Miia |
| **Website** | https://wellnessbymiia.com |
| **Email** | hello@wellnessbymiia.com |
| **Instagram** | @wellnessbymiia |
| **Vertical** | Sports Nutritionist / Nutrition Coach — Dubai |
| **Demo URL** | https://lumiere-wellness.vercel.app |
| **Proposal URL** | https://webvanguardai.github.io/proposal-lumiere-wellness/ |

### ✅ Verified Pain Points (Playwright confirmed)
- ❌ **No WhatsApp button** — Booking inquiries go through a mailto link in a site notice bar. This is extremely friction-heavy; clicking opens an email client instead of a WhatsApp chat. Verified: no `wa.me` or WhatsApp link anywhere.
- ❌ **No contact form** — No form at all. Leads must either email or Instagram DM. No middle-ground low-friction option.
- ❌ **No Google Maps** — Location/accessibility not communicated on site.
- ⚠️ **DIY Squarespace feel** — Generic template, no premium visual brand. For a specialist charging premium rates in Dubai, the site undercuts the perceived value.
- ⚠️ **April slots notice in sticky header** — Availability communicated via a janky headline banner with a raw mailto link. Unprofessional for a premium coach.

### 📧 Email Draft

**Subject:** Your website might be underselling your coaching brand, Miia

Hi Miia,

I came across Wellness By Miia while looking for sports nutritionists in Dubai — impressive credentials and great client results. But I wanted to share something honest: your website is doing your brand a disservice.

A few specific things I noticed:

- **No WhatsApp contact** — the only way to reach you is a raw email link buried in a header banner. In Dubai, clients expect to message first on WhatsApp.
- **No contact form** — without a simple form, inquiries require switching to a mail app, which most people won't do.
- The overall look of the site feels more like a starter template than a premium Dubai wellness brand.

You've clearly built real expertise — your client transformation stories are compelling. The site just doesn't reflect that yet.

We built a demo for wellness coaches and practitioners that shows a more elevated direction:

👉 Demo: https://lumiere-wellness.vercel.app  
👉 Proposal: https://webvanguardai.github.io/proposal-lumiere-wellness/

I'm [YOUR NAME] from Web Vanguard, a Dubai AI web design agency. Happy to build you a free custom mockup so you can see what it would look like for your brand specifically.

Best,
